repo_notes.content: This repository contains AI agent configuration templates, coding standards, assessment playbooks, and reusable skills. AGENTS.md is the single source of truth for all coding standards — all other agent files delegate to it. Standards files in standards/ provide detailed per-concern guidance. Playbooks in playbooks/ are standalone prompts for assessments, reviews, and planning. Skills in skills/ are reusable procedures. The primary tech stack across target projects is Java, C#/.NET, React, Node.js, and PHP.
